---
marp: true
style: |
  .clipped {
    position: absolute;
    top: 100px;
    left: 100px;
    width: 300px;
    height: 200px;
    background: #3b82f6;
    clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0% 50%);
    color: white;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
---

# Clip-path Test

<div class="clipped">Clipped diamond</div>
